title: ilex triflora var. lobbiana
intro: Ilex triflora var. lobbiana, also known as Chinese Holly or Lobb's Holly, is a plant species native to China and is a variety of the Ilex triflora plant. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ilex triflora var. lobbiana include reducing fever, treating coughs and respiratory infections, and alleviating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Ilex triflora var. lobbiana can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make decoctions and ointments for topical application.
